# Summary

Leadership covers management principles, building high-performing teams, organizational culture, and effective communication.

# Key Claims

- Effective leadership builds psychological safety and trust within teams.
- Culture drives employee engagement and retention.
- Clear communication prevents misalignment and reduces rework.
